evaluator: fresh independent full-epic Level 2 evaluator (after merge)
approval_notes: Orchestrator-directed F004 Slice 6 - the FINAL implementation slice. Slices 1 (safe fetch guard + SourceAdapter contract, PR #14), 2 (migration 0004 + run_scan orchestration, PR #15), 3 (reconciliation + migration 0005, PR #16), 4 (RSS + HTML adapters, PR #17) and 5 (structured-API + MCP adapters, PR #18) are merged to main. This contract governs Slice 6 ONLY.

Standing autonomy boundaries: may branch/implement/test/commit/push/open ONE PR; may NOT merge, flip any passes flag, add a runtime/npm dependency, weaken any existing test/fixture/CHECK/trigger, touch the offer_version immutability trigger, or attempt residual R1 (DNS-rebinding IP pinning).
F004 stays passes:false after this slice. A SEPARATE fresh-context full-epic Level 2 close-out (run AFTER this PR merges) owns the passes:true flip.
objective: Harden the community-discovery quarantine into an ENFORCED separation INVARIANT at multiple layers, closing F004 acceptance step 4 ('Confirm community sources cannot become verified evidence'). Community/unverified sources may create ONLY discovery_candidate rows plus non-official Candidate rows; they can NEVER create Evidence, an official Candidate, an Offer, or an OfferVersion. Add defense-in-depth at (a) the application layer (an explicit, centralised, testable trust-gating module used by run_scan with a guard that refuses to attach evidence to a non-official candidate) and (b) the DATABASE layer (a new reversible Alembic migration 0006 installing two PL/pgSQL triggers: candidate.official may be true only when its source is official; evidence.candidate_id may reference only an official candidate). There is no automated promotion-to-published path: quarantined discovery records are reviewable but any promotion would require the separate official-evidence pipeline and explicit human/admin disposition. run_scan/reconcile behaviour for all valid flows is unchanged; the offer_version immutability trigger and every 0001-0005 object are untouched.
scope: apps/api/app/ingest/trust.py (new): OFFICIAL_TRUST_LEVEL constant, is_official_source(source), SeparationError(RuntimeError), and assert_evidence_permitted(*, candidate_official, trust_level=None) which raises SeparationError when evidence would be attached to a non-official/quarantined candidate. Pure, import-light (no DB/HTTP).

apps/api/app/ingest/scan.py: derive is_official via is_official_source(source); add assert_evidence_permitted(candidate_official=candidate.official) as the first line of _persist_evidence (defense-in-depth). No change to run_scan's fetch->canonicalize->extract->validate->persist flow, counts, or the community->discovery_candidate branch.
apps/api/app/ingest/__init__.py: export SeparationError, is_official_source, assert_evidence_permitted, OFFICIAL_TRUST_LEVEL.

migrations/versions/0006_quarantine_separation.py (revision 0006_quarantine_separation, down_revision 0005_change_event_candidate_link): install trg_candidate_official_source (BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON candidate: NEW.official true => source.trust_level must be 'official') and trg_evidence_official_candidate (BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON evidence: candidate_id NOT NULL => that candidate.official must be true), both RAISE EXCEPTION ... USING ERRCODE='restrict_violation'. Fully reversible downgrade drops both triggers + functions only. Adds no table/column/constraint (no ORM drift); does not touch trg_offer_version_immutable or any 0001-0005 object.

tests/unit/test_ingest_trust.py: is_official_source true/false; assert_evidence_permitted passes for official and raises SeparationError for community; scan._persist_evidence guard raises SeparationError when handed a non-official candidate (no DB needed).

tests/integration/test_ingest_separation.py (live PG): (1) community scan -> only discovery_candidate rows, 0 evidence, 0 official candidates, 0 offer, 0 offer_version; (2) raw INSERT of evidence referencing a community candidate is rejected by Trigger B (IntegrityError); (3) INSERT and UPDATE of a candidate with official=true on a community source is rejected by Trigger A; a community candidate cannot be flipped official; (4) official scan still produces Candidate+Evidence (no regression); (5) migration 0006 up->down->up: both separation triggers present after up, absent after down, trg_offer_version_immutable survives throughout, compare_metadata drift == [].
scripts/stack-smoke.ps1 + scripts/stack-smoke.sh: add a 'Separation triggers installed (0006)' check asserting trg_candidate_official_source and trg_evidence_official_candidate exist.
docs/DATA_MODEL.md (+ a one-line note in docs/SOURCE_REUSE_AND_PROVENANCE.md): document the quarantine separation invariant and migration 0006 triggers.
out_of_scope: Any change to run_scan/reconcile logic beyond adding is_official_source() and the _persist_evidence guard (Slice 2/3 invariants unchanged).
Creating or mutating offer/offer_version (no publication path); the offer_version immutability trigger is untouched.
Any automated promotion of a discovery_candidate to published/verified state; promotion remains a separate official-evidence + human/admin concern, not built here.
Wiring ingestion into the worker/scheduler/API runtime.
Residual R1 (DNS-rebinding IP pinning) from Slice 1 - explicitly deferred.
Any new runtime or npm dependency (requirements-sync guard stays green; PL/pgSQL + stdlib only).
Marking F004 passes:true (reserved for the separate post-merge full-epic Level 2 close-out).
acceptance_criteria: Community quarantine: a community/unverified scan produces ONLY discovery_candidate rows (verification_status='unverified') plus non-official Candidate rows, and ZERO evidence, ZERO official candidates, ZERO offer, ZERO offer_version.
App-layer separation: run_scan gates evidence creation through an explicit trust check; assert_evidence_permitted refuses to attach evidence to a non-official candidate (unit-proven both directions).

DB-layer separation, direction 1: evidence.candidate_id may reference only an official candidate; a raw INSERT of evidence for a community (official=false) candidate is rejected by Trigger B at the database.

DB-layer separation, direction 2: a candidate.official=true is permitted only when its source is official; a raw INSERT or UPDATE that marks a community-source candidate official is rejected by Trigger A. A quarantined community candidate cannot be promoted into the official pipeline from community data alone.
No regression: an official scan still produces Candidate + Evidence exactly as before; run_scan counts and the reconcile pass are unchanged.

Migration 0006 is reversible: up->down->up leaves compare_metadata drift == []; both separation triggers exist after up and are gone after down; trg_offer_version_immutable and all 0001-0005 tables/CHECKs/triggers survive throughout.
No publication path / immutability intact: no offer_version is written and trg_offer_version_immutable is untouched.
Supply chain: no new Python or npm dependency; requirements-sync guard stays green; stdlib + PL/pgSQL only.
Regression green: scripts/test.ps1 and scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit pass offline (ruff, format, pytest, prettier, eslint, detect-secrets, pip-audit, npm audit) including requirements-sync.
F004 remains passes:false; a fresh-context independent full-epic Level 2 evaluator (post-merge) owns any status change.

integration_commands: Required: Slice 6 adds migration 0006 (DB triggers). Fresh live DB cycle on alternate host ports (POSTGRES_PORT=55432, API_PORT=8010, WEB_PORT=8090): docker compose down --volumes -> up --build (fresh DB applies 0001-0006) -> scripts/stack-smoke.ps1 -> pytest tests/integration/test_ingest_separation.py + test_ingest_scan.py + test_ingest_reconcile.py + test_domain_migration.py -> docker compose down --volumes.
Prove 0006 reversibility (manual up->down->up AND the round-trip test) with compare_metadata drift == [] and 0001-0005 tables/triggers/CHECKs intact.

risks.data_migration: Migration 0006 adds only two BEFORE INSERT/UPDATE triggers (+ their functions); no table/column/constraint change, so ORM metadata is unchanged and compare_metadata drift stays []. Downgrade drops exactly those triggers/functions. offer_version and its immutability trigger are untouched.
risks.security_privacy: This slice strengthens the trust boundary: community/quarantined data cannot cross into verified evidence at either the application or the database layer. No new network surface; adapters and the SafeFetcher seam are unchanged.
risks.portability: PL/pgSQL triggers use standard ERRCODE 'restrict_violation' (class 23 -> IntegrityError) as the existing immutability trigger does; pure standard-library Python otherwise; amd64/arm64 unaffected.
risks.zero_cost_safety: No offer data is published; quarantine remains candidate/discovery only; 'unknown is better than guessed'; no Z0/free claim is asserted. Tests use a synthetic 'example'/'acme' provider, so no unsupported real free-tier claim is introduced.
risks.regression: run_scan's valid-flow behaviour and counts are unchanged (the new guard raises only in a should-never-happen case); the candidate trigger checks source trust only when official=true, so the community and official flows and the reconcile UPDATE of verification_state are unaffected.
risks.supply_chain: No new Python or npm dependency; requirements-sync guard stays green.

notes: Orchestrator directed Slice 6 (final F004 implementation slice), then STOP for a fresh-context full-epic Level 2 close-out. Do NOT flip passes; do NOT merge; do NOT proceed past this slice.
